subcodes.title: Words spoken at Hotel Marquardt in Stuttgart, 1913-04-26
subcodes.first_line: The Swiss are a receptive people. Should this Cause be spread in that land, blessed souls would be raised up as a result
subcodes.first_line_orig: اهالی سویس مردمان با استعدادی هستند اگر این امر را در آنجا منتشر شود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
